scripts.apk:debug: cd android && set JAVA_HOME=C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio\jbr&& .\gradlew.bat assembleDebug && copy /Y app\build\outputs\apk\debug\app-debug.apk ..\RuSamaraWave-debug.apk
scripts.apk:release: cd android && set JAVA_HOME=C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio\jbr&& .\gradlew.bat assembleRelease bundleRelease && copy /Y app\build\outputs\apk\release\app-release-unsigned.apk ..\RuSamaraWave-release-unsigned.apk 2>nul & copy /Y app\build\outputs\apk\release\app-release.apk ..\RuSamaraWave-release.apk 2>nul & copy /Y app\build\outputs\bundle\release\app-release.aab ..\RuSamaraWave-release.aab 2>nul
scripts.build: npm run build:rsw && npx cap sync android && npm run apk:debug
